title: End of Term Examinations Schedule
body: The end of term examinations will begin on June 2, 2026. All students are reminded to review the timetable posted on the notice board. Students must arrive 15 minutes early on examination days. No mobile phones allowed in the examination hall.

title: Parent-Teacher Conference
body: We are pleased to announce the annual Parent-Teacher Conference scheduled for May 25, 2026. All parents are encouraged to attend. Appointment slots can be booked through the school office. This is an important opportunity to discuss student progress.

title: School Sports Day
body: The annual Sports Day will be held on May 30, 2026 at the school grounds. All students are expected to participate. Events include track and field, football, volleyball, and basketball. Students should come in their house colours. Parents are welcome to attend.

title: Library Books Return Deadline
body: All students who have borrowed books from the school library are reminded to return them by May 20, 2026. Late returns will incur a fine of 500 RWF per day. Students with outstanding books will not receive their term reports.

title: New Teaching Resources Available
body: The school has acquired new teaching resources including updated textbooks for Mathematics and Sciences. These resources are available in the teachers' lounge. Teachers are encouraged to review them before the next term.

title: Holiday Notice: National Heroes Day
body: Please be informed that the school will be closed on February 1, 2026 in observance of National Heroes Day. Normal classes will resume on February 2, 2026. We encourage all students and staff to participate in community activities on this day.

title: Scholarship Applications Open
body: Applications for the Greenfield Academy Excellence Scholarship are now open. Students in S5 and S6 with an average score above 80% are eligible to apply. Application forms are available at the administration office. Deadline: May 31, 2026.

title: Mandatory Staff Meeting
body: All teaching staff are required to attend a mandatory meeting on May 20, 2026 at 3:00 PM in the conference room. Agenda: Review of academic calendar, grading policy updates, and preparation for end-of-term assessments. Attendance is compulsory.
